raw_comment:
I noticed that the MLS has the highest percentage of colored head coaches, while the NFL has the least. I also noticed that the MLB is both low in percentage of colored players and head coaches.

I noticed that the MLS has the highest percentage of colored head coaches, while the NFL has the least. I also noticed that the MLB is both low in percentage of colored players and head coaches.

This impacts my community and I because it really shows how people of colored still feel they don’t have equal opportunities. This can relate to the BLM movement because of the lack of colored head coaches. This may also affect kids and students of color with dreams to become a professional head coach.

This graph shows the difference between the percentage of colored players to head coaches in major league sports.
“When Will Professional Sports Finally Become Equal?”
